_doc: Copy to <project>/.claude/heimdall-conceal.json and tune. Drives BOTH the PreToolUse guard (deny patterns) and setup-secrets-heimdall.sh (install).
_brokerPath_doc: Optional. Leave empty to default to a PER-REPO path (/usr/local/lib/mcp-broker/<repo>/mcp-pg-broker) so hardening/reverting one project never clobbers another. broker.conf is always written next to the broker binary.
_injectCommands_doc: Optional, ALTERNATIVE to wrapper/MCP. CLI consumers that need a secret in their environment, run via the setuid broker with NO sudo: the agent runs `<brokerPath> <name> [args]` and the command runs as runnerUser with the secret in its env. A repo uses EITHER wrapper (MCP) OR injectCommands — the broker runs one wrapper. Each entry: name (allow-listed logical name), exec (absolute path to the command; root-controlled, the agent cannot pick it), secretsFile (KEY=value file sourced into the command's env; locked to runnerUser), groups (optional supplementary groups the runner needs, e.g. ["docker"]). The command receives HEIMDALL_CALLER_UID=<invoker> so it can chown outputs back.
_guard_overrides: Optional. If omitted, file patterns derive from secretsFiles basenames; command patterns default to /proc environ + PGPASSWORD.
